debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : Countable V
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ Measure.map (fun ω => G ω ⊔ H ω) P =
    @SimpleGraph.binomialRandom V (unitInterval.symm (unitInterval.symm p * unitInterval.symm q))

proof:
by
    rw [← (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq]
    congr with ω
    simp
failed_attempts:
by
    rw [binomialRandom_eq_map, ← (hG.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet.union hY.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet
      (h_indep.comp measurable_edgeSet measurable_edgeSet)).map_eq,
      Measure.map_map measurable_fromEdgeSet]
    · congr with ω; ext; simp
    · exact (measurable_edgeSet.comp_aemeasurable hG.aemeasurable).sup
        (measurable_edgeSet.comp_aemeasurable hY.aemeasurable)

by
    convert ((hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl).map_eq
    ext ω
    simp

by
    rw [← (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq]
    exact Measure.map_congr (by intro; simp [compl_inf_compl])
  aemeasurable := hG.aemeasurable.sup hY.aemeasurable

(by ext; simp) ▸ (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq
  aemeasurable := (by ext; simp) ▸ (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.aemeasurable

by
    rw [binomialRandom_eq_map, ← (hG.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet.sup hY.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet
      (hindep.comp measurable_edgeSet measurable_edgeSet)).map_eq,
      Measure.map_map measurable_fromEdgeSet (by fun_prop)]
    congr with ω
    simp

by
    rw [binomialRandom_eq_map, ← Measure.map_map measurable_fromEdgeSet
      (measurable_edgeSet.comp <| hG.aemeasurable.sup hY.aemeasurable)]
    congr 1
    convert (IsBernoulliOn.union hG.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet hY.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet
      (h_indep.comp measurable_edgeSet measurable_edgeSet)).map_eq using 2
    · ext; simp
    · rw [Subtype.ext_iff]; push_cast; simp [sub_mul, mul_sub]
  aemeasurable := hG.aemeasurable.sup hY.aemeasurable

by
    rw [← (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq, Measure.map_congr]
    exact ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ by simp
  aemeasurable := (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.aemeasurable.congr <| ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ by simp

by
    have h := hG.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet.union hY.isBernoulliOn_edgeSet
      (h_indep.comp measurable_edgeSet measurable_edgeSet)
    rw [binomialRandom_eq_map, ← h.map_eq, Measure.map_map measurable_fromEdgeSet h.aemeasurable]
    congr
    · ext; simp
    · simp
successful_attempts:
by
    rw [← (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq]
    congr with ω
    simp

by
    rw [← (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq]
    congr with ω
    simp only [compl_inf, compl_compl]

by
    convert (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq using 2
    ext
    simp [compl_inf]

by
    rw [← (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq]
    congr with ω
    simp

by
    convert (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq using 2
    ext ω
    rw [← compl_sup, compl_compl]

by
    rw [← (hG.compl.inf hY.compl).compl.map_eq]
    congr with ω
    simp
